description: This tutorial explains how to verify Solana programs, ensuring that the on-chain program matches the source code provided by developers. It covers the steps to deploy the program to a public repository, build it in a Docker container, and verify it using the Solana Verify CLI. The process enhances program discoverability and allows users to confirm the integrity of the source code.
topic_summary: Learn how to verify your Solana programs to ensure they are built from the correct source code. This includes deploying to a public repository, building in Docker, and using the Solana Verify CLI for verification. [t=0:24] [t=1:54] [t=2:40] [t=3:20] [t=4:00]
